projectDescription: A Windows-based proxy tool that bypasses Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) by manipulating IP/TCP headers and injecting fake TLS ClientHello packets with a spoofed SNI to obscure the real destination from network censorship systems.
keyFeatures: DPI bypass via IP/TCP header manipulation
Fake TLS ClientHello injection with configurable SNI
Wrong sequence number bypass method to confuse DPI devices
Async TCP proxy relay using Python asyncio
Configurable listen host/port and outbound destination
publicApiSurface: config.json — LISTEN_HOST, LISTEN_PORT, CONNECT_IP, CONNECT_PORT, FAKE_SNI
main.py — entry point, asyncio server loop
FakeInjectiveConnection — manages per-connection fake injection state
FakeTcpInjector — WinDivert-based injector with fake_send_thread, on_inbound_packet, on_outbound_packet
TcpInjector (abstract) — base class for packet injection loop
MonitorConnection — tracks TCP connection state (SYN seq, SYN-ACK seq, thread lock)
